title: Smoky Lamb Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional tacos, featuring tender lamb and a tangy slaw made with silky Ethiopian cabbage.
instructions: Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb, smoky paprika, Ethiopian berbere spice, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Form the lamb mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Grill the lamb patties for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, in a separate bowl, whisk together the lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Add the sliced Ethiopian cabbage to the bowl and toss to coat with the lime juice mixture.
Warm the tacos according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing a cooked lamb patty onto a warmed taco, followed by a spoonful of the slaw.
